subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God and daughter of His handmaid, render thanks that the light of thine eyes hath become a servant at the Divine Threshold and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله و ابنه امته شکر کن که نور دیده ات در آستان الهی خادم گشت و در
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
